About Me

Built on precision,
driven by curiosity.

I'm a motivated IT graduate from Mindanao State University – Naawan, majoring in Database Systems. My journey spans web development, bookkeeping, government administrative work, and visual design — making me a rare mix of technical depth and operational versatility.

Whether I'm architecting a database, managing accounts, or designing brand assets, I bring the same standard: organized thinking, sharp attention to detail, and a drive to get things right.
